Name: $Detonator_M
Description:
Setups a detonation sequence. After a while, blows up the ship, dealing severe damage.

The Quantum Detonator is extremely common. Desperation moves, terror attacks, and to prevent important assets from falling to undesired hands. It blows up a ship with extreme force, leaving little remains, and inflicting serious damage to anything caught in it's blast. A common sight, yet a grim reminder of the constant dangers of space.
